mapper.sql: id, session_id, content, message_ids, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id, content, message_ids::text AS message_ids, created_at, updated_at FROM chat_summary WHERE session_id = CAST(#{sessionId} AS uuid)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_summary (session_id, content, message_ids, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (CAST(#{sessionId} AS uuid), #{content}, CAST(#{messageIds, typeHandler=com.kaer.typehandler.JsonArrayToStrListTypeHandler} AS jsonb), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ON CONFLICT (session_id) DO UPDATE SET content = EXCLUDED.content, message_ids = EXCLUDED.message_ids, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
